name: great-tusk
flavor_texts: Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. The name Great Tusk was taken from a creature listed in a certain book.
This creature resembles a mysterious Pokémon that, according to a paranormal magazine, has lived since ancient times.
text: Great-tusk is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a ground and fighting-type Pokémon. Abilities: protosynthesis. Base stats — HP: 115, Attack: 131, Defense: 131, Sp. Atk: 53, Sp. Def: 53, Speed: 87. Evolution line: great-tusk. Lore: Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. The name Great Tusk was taken from a creature listed in a certain book. This creature resembles a mysterious Pokémon that, according to a paranormal magazine, has lived since ancient times.
